title: EthernaWorld
description: This mods plans to add new ores, structures, machines to your minecraft world ! Currently in beta, it adds ores, tools, blocks, a little magic system and structures.
body:
This mod aims to add new ores, structures, mobs and machines to Minecraft. However right now this mod is in beta and all the features haven't been implemented yet.

**Ores** :

The Ruby Ore and the Amethyst Ore can be generated in the overworld between y = 0 / y = -50. The Topaz Ore on the other hand can be generated in the end between y = 0 and y = 60. Thanks to these new ores you can creave a new set of tools/weapons better than diamond/netherite but not too overpowered (so that it can still respect vanilla minecraft guidelines).

To create these new weapons you'll need to craft the new upgrade trims and use them on a smithing table (so that netherite isn't just being left over). To see all the crafts, I'd recommend using NEI or JEI.

**Blocks** : New blocks have been added (more blocks are coming in the next updates) going all the way from decorative blocks to useful ones !

**Structures** : Multiple structures have been added to the game in order to make it feel more lively ! Currently there are only 3 structures but I plan to create more in the near future !

**Entities** : The wither/ender dragon boss fight have been tweaked in order to be more difficult ! You can also obtain new rewards while fighting them. Custom mobs will be added in future updates.

**Magic system** : New Spells have been added to the game some of them will be more balanced soon but there are useful when fighting multiple mobs ! Be careful though, some spells cannot be use on some mobs. These are however design to only hit agressive mobs not players or passive ones.

**Machines** : Some utilitary blocks and machines have been added ! The protective core prevents explosion in a 24 blocks radius. The ender elevator works like an elevator if you jump and there is one above you, you will get teleported above and if you sneak you will get teleported downwards. The upgrader allows you to create multiple things or to recharge some items thanks to energified crystals ! I will create a recipe book for that in the next update.
